words.def: (criminal law) an act punishable by law; usually considered an evil act
words.zh: n. 犯罪, 罪行, 罪惡

words.def: any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tails
grains used as food either unpolished or more often polished
words.zh: n. 米, 米飯, 稻

words.def: the shape of a raised edge of a more or less circular object
words.zh: n. 邊, 輪緣, 框

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂
